summary: Toggle component standardization testing complete. Verified Toggle component works on Campaigns page (new campaign form) and Persona Settings page. The 'Auto-introduce on first contact' toggle is now FULLY VISIBLE on Persona page - previous visibility bug is FIXED.

integration_issues.issue: Page shows infinite loading spinner when navigating directly via URL. Works correctly when navigating through app flow (More tab -> Profile & Persona)

action_items: Add data-testid attribute to Toggle component for better automated testing support
critical_code_review_comments: Toggle.tsx: Well-implemented reusable component with proper state handling, hitSlop for better touch targets
Toggle.tsx: Missing data-testid attribute - suggested adding: data-testid={`toggle-${value ? 'on' : 'off'}`}
persona.tsx: Toggle at line 326-330 properly uses Toggle component with activeColor='#34C759' (green)
campaigns/index.tsx: Toggle at line 119-123 properly uses Toggle component with activeColor='#007AFF' (blue)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Toggle component standardization verified. New Campaign form has Active Campaign toggle that changes state correctly (green ON -> gray OFF). Persona Settings page has Auto-introduce toggle that is now fully visible (previously reported as not visible). Note: Direct URL navigation to /settings/persona may show infinite loading - navigate through app flow instead.

campaigns_toggle.status: PASS - UI state changes correctly (ON=green, OFF=gray)

persona_toggle.visibility_bug_fix: VERIFIED FIXED - Toggle is now fully visible on screen
